title: Actually Beta Nether
description: Actually removes all modern features from the Nether. Fork of Just Beta Nether
body:
Actually Beta Nether removes all modern features from the Nether; including ores, mobs, biomes, and structures. **NOTE: Does NOT use the Nether world generator from Beta! You'll need [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta) for that!** For best results, pair Actually Beta Nether with [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks), [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta), and [Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)!
Featured in my modpack [Authentic Beta](https://modrinth.com/project/CRK4NXpU)!

_Fork of [Just Beta Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-beta-nether)_
